subcodes.first_line: We hear the voice of the doubters from every region, and the call of the assured ones from all quarters. Verily, those who have doubted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نسمع صوت المریبین من الاقطار و ندآء الموقنین من کل الاشطار ان الذین ارتابوا
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power of the Manifestation of God
